sections.label: Sensor Hub
sections.description: ESP32 sensor-hub fleet based on glaecier-sensorhub-data-collector.

version_changes.description: Bump FIRMWARE_VERSION to 3.22.2
Fix console deviceDisplay not applied at boot
Self-reported hardware identity in registration
Remove dfplayer/audio sensor; API-driven display config sync
Modernize TFT display UI with flat dark theme
Switch OneWire stack to OneWireNg + serial command cleanup
Fix OneWire support on GPIO > 33 (ESP32-S3)
Add MAC override and OneWire scan serial commands
Fix WiFi offline deadman  restart after 2h with stored creds and no init
Quiet sub-threshold IMU recalibration refresh telemetry
Cleaner digital-sensor telemetry: count_mode drops the noisy state field
Improve platform motion sway telemetry
Replace state with pressed field in digital sensor trigger events
wifi_manager: bootstrap NTP after connect; trigger logs use sensor_id
Buzzer feedback on boost button press: long beep on activate, short on cancel, error on fail
Improved sensor log field names: action_button now reports boostActive and persists triggerCount across reboots; digital sensor adds lastPressTime and drops countSinceLastLog
action_button: add toggle behaviour, drop cooldown
Motion sensor: calibration and tilt events out of logs (098c3fd); init: enable event queue drain task so queued events actually reach the API (1e033cc)
Improve OTA download throughput and add resumable downloads
Show per-step progress on init screen during boot
IMU reporting improvements: tilt event counter, drop noisy fields
LSM9DS1 IMU motion sensor: roll/pitch/tilt stats to console
WiFi credentials configurable via credentials.ini
OTA display progress and auto-restart on update
Always show firmware version and WiFi status on all display screens
OTA retry on transient failures + deferred OTA failure reporting via NVS
add automatic recovery restarts: deadman timer, sensor staleness, and init timeout
Deploy scripts version check before console upload
Suppress transient NTP time sync errors on startup and after OTA reboots
Fix OTA download stall  abort if no data received for 30 seconds
Add OTA firmware update progress screen to TFT display
Fixed build errors, removed algea references and updated audio-player-scheduler
OTA check-in-progress tracking and NVS persistence for OTA state
New Sensor base class virtuals, telemetry event queuing, ApiCredentials struct
Sensor recovery overhaul, HTTP timeout fixes, ADC validation improvements
Coherent config structure refactor  normalized naming and improved logging
Fix periodic ~5h restarts caused by DHCP lease expiry
Add DFPlayer scheduler with closing times, WiFi status icon, fix duplicate active errors, coherent device config structure
Remove legacy code and align codebase to fixed PCB pin layout
Add automatic event and error creation upon registration and remove old code remedies
Add canvas buffering, key-value line wrapping, and dirty-flag display rendering
Add memory lifecycle management, BLE availability policy, sensor tests, and resilience improvements
Add detailed WiFi state display, restart reason screen, and display padding/rotation
Drop multi-board support, add early Hardware pin init, auto-resolve sensor pins from config.h, and define missing PCB pins.
Add display state machine with provisioning screens and config-driven runtime pages
Add OTA firmware update support
Extract reusable ApiClient class from api.cpp
Add diagnostic serial commands, connection soak test, and SPIFFS health monitoring
Eliminate blocking delays and add watchdog-safe WdtGuard wrapper
Replace String with stack buffers and remove unused device-side timestamps
Embed firmware version at build time with startup banner
Migrate to ArduinoJson v7 and move credentials to git-ignored file
Target sensor hub v1.4 only  removes all multi-hardware support
More robust MODBUS and simpler device settings fetch
Improved error reporting with more detailed failure messages
Fix OneWire pin parsing, sensor init hang, and WiFi error messages
Config validation and WiFi manager consolidation fixes
Virtual device membership from config and cached display readings
Add telemetry wrappers for log uploads and restart reporting
JSON buffer pre-sizing and compile warning fixes
Safer config reload with hash-based change detection and strict SPIFFS validation
Refactor main.cpp into focused modules (no behavior change)
Add Wroom support, new sensors, and configurable sample delay
Stability/Perf tuning: guard SPIFFS init, flatten sensor caches, stream config hashing, and reuse shared JSON buffers
Fix critical bug where devices stop sending logs after connecting to new WiFi network via BLE
Improve system reliability with WiFi reconnection handling and enhanced diagnostics
Add pressure sensor device example with 4-20mA current loop
Implement ESP32-S3 TFT display system for real-time monitoring
Add 4-20mA current loop sensor conversion support
Implement universal sensor frequent checking system and update documentation
Fix digital switch timezone handling with automatic DST calculation
Fix JSON parsing preventing log interval configuration
Version bump: patch
Patch for digital switchTimezone and scheduling patch for digital switch
Implement sensor-specific error tracking and virtual device attribution
Added timestamps to audio-switcher log / digital sensor logs
Added hold time to digital switch
Implement SSL memory failure recovery with automatic restartSL memory failure recovery with automatic restart
Data priorization for MODBUS sensors
Memory logging and mock data for easier testing and debugging
Fixed MODBUS directional control implementation
Enhanced digital switch with configurable labels and immediate logging
More robust wifi initialization implemented
Added support for digital switches ()digital switches, relays etc.)
OneWire bus scan upon sensor initialization for easier debugging
Deep setting comparison to trigger sensor reinitialization on all sensor setting updates
Added algae sensor
Digital sensor now saves total count in non volatile memory
Onewire mapping send as event and minor log layout change
Fixed sensor index for address based onewire sensor initialization
Optimized version tracking for easier management
Improved handling of device naming for single device configurations
MODBUS now supports TTL to RS485 with direction pin
Updated wifi credential initialization
Virtual devices uses master/slave configuration and hardware config is implemented to prevent wrong pin configuration
Fixed virtual device settings fetching
Patched problem with edge, state detection of digital sensors
Added support for virtual devices
Updated event send logic, to lessen trafic
Version 1.2.1 - Stable version
Fix inconsistent handling of log intervals
Improved MODBUS sensor implementation
Implement device configuration management system
Initial consolidated template

sections.label: Controllers
sections.description: Heat and humidity control devices with independent firmware tracks.
